data_type_evidence: claude_code/data_loader.py:22 — Uses `datasets.MNIST(root, train=train, download=True)` to load real MNIST digits from torchvision
claude_code/data_loader.py:33-49 — `_create_spurious_colors()` synthetically generates color labels using `np.random.rand()` to create spurious correlations between color and digit class
